label: 01-hello
nouri: Hi there! How can I help you today? Are you looking to share some food, find available food nearby, or manage your listings?

label: 02-need-food
user: my grandson is hungry and we got nothing in the fridge. can you help me find some food
nouri:
Here's what's available near you right now:

2. Watermelon — 1 piece, pickup at 1423 Park St, Alameda, CA

Which one would you like to claim for your grandson? Reply with the number or the name.

label: 04-pick-first
user: the first one sounds good for him, he loves a turkey sandwich
nouri: Great choice! Just to clarify, the first one on the list is Eggs, but the turkey sandwiches are item #5. Did you want to claim the Eggs (right at your address) or the Fresh sandwiches (about 0.9 km away at 1500 Webster St)? Let me know which one you’d like for your grandson.

label: 05-confirm
nouri: Done! I claimed the 8 Fresh sandwiches for you. You can pick them up at 1500 Webster St, Alameda, CA 94501. Just let me know once you've got them!

label: 06-followup
user: how do i pick it up? i'm not good with this phone stuff
nouri:
No problem at all! Here’s what to do:

- Go to 1500 Webster St, Alameda, CA 94501.
- Let the person there know you claimed the “Fresh sandwiches” on DoGoods for your grandson.
- They’ll have your name and will give you the food.

If you want, I can give you step-by-step walking directions or help set a reminder so you don’t forget. Would you like directions?

label: 07-share
user: actually wait, i got some extra soup at home, can someone come get it?
nouri:
Absolutely! I can help you share your extra soup. 

Let’s get a few quick details:
- How much soup do you have to give away? (For example: “2 quarts,” “1 big pot,” or “4 servings”)

label: 08-pivot
user: nevermind the soup, can i get those apples too for my grandson's lunch tomorrow
nouri: Nice choice — the Bag of apples at 2100 Central Ave is available. There are 12 apples listed. How many would you like to claim for your grandson?

label: 09-cancel
user: actually i changed my mind on the sandwich, my daughter is bringing dinner
nouri: No problem, I released your claim on the Fresh sandwiches. They’re back up for others to claim. If you want to claim something else or need any other help, just let me know!

label: 10-thanks
user: ok thank you dear, you've been very kind
nouri: You’re very welcome! If you ever need help finding food, sharing extra, or just have questions, I’m here for you. Take care — and I hope your grandson enjoys his lunch!
